changelog: 🗣️ Full-duplex conversation — interrupt Jarvis mid-sentence and he stops and listens; follow-ups flow without the wake word.
🔁 "Repeat that" + short-term memory — he can re-say his last reply, and "tell me more" finally works.
💬 A real chat window — 'Just chat' mode is a private, local ChatGPT-style conversation with any installed model. Nothing leaves your machine.
⚙️ ThorAI Settings — choose how chatty confirmations are (Full/Simple/Off), toggle interruptions, pick your search engine. Say "open ThorAI settings".
🔴 AMD Radeon support out of the box — VRAM detected, right model tier picked, zero driver setup (verified on an RX 7900 XTX).
📦 New ISOs ship with a starter AI baked in — the assistant answers from first boot with no internet at all.
